---
title: "Calendar"
---

## About

This page describes some of the specific actions that need to be taken leading up to and on Field Day.

## May 2026

- [X] Add info to ARRL Field Day website. (W3TM)
- [ ] Create Field Day [budget](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/19nvy50xuPFYsw2WEzRyj7bWH7aAacUKBGc_DS8plzqY/edit?usp=sharing).
    - [ ] Food & drink budget. 
    - [ ] Porta-Potty estimate. (K3CWP)
    - [ ] Equipment estimate.
    - [ ] PR and supply estimate.
- [ ] Secure NARC BoD budget approval. (W3TM & K3YV).

## June 2026

### 4 weeks out

- [ ] Add event to web-based activity calendars.
    - [ ] WSPU activity calendar. (H3LP)
    - [ ] State College dot com calendar. (H3LP)
- [ ] Send invitations to other groups
    - [ ] Pack 67 Cub Scouts. (H3LP)
    - [ ] Central PA Observers. (H3LP)
    - [ ] Announce on ARES net (H3LP)
- [ ] Draft and send invitations to elected officials. (H3LP)
- [ ] Draft and send invitation to served agency official. (H3LP)
- [ ] Schedule Porta-Potty Cleaning (K3CWP).
- [X] Distribute [member survey](survey.qmd) (W3TM).

### 3 weeks out 


- [ ] Draft press release and send to media outlets. (H3LP)
- [ ] Evaluate survey results; assign volunteers to teams. (W3TM)
- [ ] Send emails to specific volunteer teams.
    - [ ] Food. (H3LP)
    - [ ] Ed Activity. (H3LP)
    - [ ] PR. (H3LP)

### 2 weeks out

- [ ] Test networked logging. 
    - [ ] Phone
    - [ ] CW
    - [ ] WSJT-X
    - [ ] fldigi
    - [ ] VarAC
    - [ ] JS8Call

### Week of event 

- [ ] Order food
  - [] Order lunch for Saturday from Mike's
  - [ ] Dinner Saturday from Papa John's
  - [ ] Breakfast Sunday from Rick & Michelle
- [ ] Buy food and drink
  - [ ] Water & soda
  - [ ] Coffee
    - [ ] Bag/ground
    - [ ] Pods
  - [ ] Chips
  - [ ] Cookies
  - [ ] Fruit
- [ ] Assess supplies
  - [ ] Paper goods
  - [ ] Cups
  - [ ] Utencils
  - [ ] Napkins
  - [ ] Paper towels
  - [ ] Trash bags
- Buy needed supplies
  - [ ] Septic-safe toilet paper
- [ ] Clean-up station interior
  - [ ] Dust or vacuum all surfaces
  - [ ] Sweep, vacuum, & mop
  - [ ] Move excess gear from shack to shed
  - [ ] Clean cooler
- [ ] Add Field Day indicator to W3TM-10 APRS I-Gate.

### Field Day Weekend (June 26 - 28)

#### Friday, June 26

#### Saturday, June 27

- [ ] Buy ice.
- [ ] Set up food & drink. [Set-up Committee](people.qmd#set-up-comm); [Food Committee](people.qmd#food.com).
    - [ ] Pick up Subway.
- [ ] Set up info table. [Info Table Committee](people.qmd#field-comm)

::: {.callout-warning}
**2:00 PM EDT (1800 UTC) Field Day begins**

Staff Field Station/Info Table 2:00 pm - 5:00 pm. [Field Station Committee](people.qmd#field-comm)
:::

- [ ] Host educational activity. Time TBD. [Ed Committee](people.qmd#ed-comm)
- [ ] Pick-up pizza. Time TBD. (people.qmd#food-comm)

#### Sunday, June 28

::: {.callout-warning}
Staff Field Station/Info Table 11:00 am - 2:00 pm. [Field Station Committee](people.qmd#field-comm)

**2:00 PM EDT (1800 UTC) Field Day ends**
:::

### Week after

- [ ] Clean logs and submit to ARRL. (N3LI?)
